languages.text: "Мне все ясно. Давайте поговорим о чем-то другом".
"Everything is clear to me. Let's talk about something else."
languages.original_text: "Мне все ясно. Давайте поговорим о чем-то другом".

traits.locale_text: "Everything is clear to me. Let's talk about something else."
"Everything is clear to me. Let's talk about something else."
"Everything is clear to me. Let's talk about something else."

languages.text: “事情我都清楚了。我们聊点别的吧。”
languages.original_text: "Everything is clear to me. Let's talk about something else."

traits.locale_text: “事情我都清楚了。我们聊点别的吧。”

languages.text: « Tout est clair. Parlons d'autre chose. »
languages.original_text: "Everything is clear to me. Let's talk about something else."

traits.locale_text: « Tout est clair. Parlons d'autre chose. »

languages.text: "Her şey kafamda oturdu. Başka bir şeyden konuşalım."
languages.original_text: "Everything is clear to me. Let's talk about something else."

traits.locale_text: "Her şey kafamda oturdu. Başka bir şeyden konuşalım."

languages.text: «Lo tengo todo claro. Hablemos de otra cosa».
languages.original_text: "Everything is clear to me. Let's talk about something else."

traits.locale_text: «Lo tengo todo claro. Hablemos de otra cosa».

languages.text: "Mir ist alles klar. Reden wir über etwas anderes."
languages.original_text: "Everything is clear to me. Let's talk about something else."

traits.locale_text: "Mir ist alles klar. Reden wir über etwas anderes."

languages.text: 「私はすべてが理解できます。別の話題について話しましょう。」
languages.original_text: "Everything is clear to me. Let's talk about something else."

traits.locale_text: 「私はすべてが理解できます。別の話題について話しましょう。」
